description: A short LLM-written prose summary of Ethan's coding over the last 7 days, derived from the same GitHub + WakaTime activity. Plain third-person paragraph — quote it directly when summarizing what he's currently working on.

data.summary: This week, Ethan Qiu logged 26 hrs 18 mins of coding time, with a daily average of 2 hrs 11 mins. His activity was mostly in Other (42%), Java (39%), and Markdown (16%). The JSON does not list any public repositories, commits, pull requests, or new repos this week.
